mapper.insert: INSERT INTO claude_invocation (trigger_msg_id, trigger_device_id, total_rounds, status, created_at) VALUES (#{triggerMsgId}, #{triggerDeviceId}, 0, 'running', #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE claude_invocation SET status = #{status}, reply_msg_id = #{replyMsgId}, total_rounds = #{totalRounds}, finished_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, trigger_msg_id, trigger_device_id, reply_msg_id, total_rounds, status, created_at, finished_at FROM claude_invocation ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
